# styls.ai — Comprehensive Codebase Documentation

> **Application Name:** styls.ai (mes-genai-ui)  
> **Framework:** Next.js 15.3.8 (App Router)  
> **Language:** TypeScript 5.x  
> **Package Manager:** pnpm  
> **Runtime:** React 19, Node.js 20  
> **Generated:** February 16, 2026

---

## 1. Project Overview

**styls.ai** is a comprehensive **Generative AI platform for creative fashion workflows**. It provides fashion designers and brands with AI-powered tools for product design, virtual try-on, video generation, pattern creation, image editing, tech pack management, and more.

### Core Features

| Feature                | Description                                                    |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Product Design**     | Text-to-image AI product design with magic prompt assistance   |
| **Virtual Trial**      | Virtual garment try-on with model and background customization |
| **Video Generation**   | AI-powered fashion video creation from photoshoot images       |
| **Sketch to Render**   | Convert hand-drawn sketches to photorealistic 3D renders       |
| **Sketch Generator**   | Generate 2D technical flats from uploaded images               |
| **Precise Editing**    | Canvas-based inpainting for garment detail modifications       |
| **Background Change**  | AI-powered photoshoot background replacement                   |
| **Apply Print**        | Apply prints/patterns onto garment images                      |
| **Seamless Prints**    | Generate seamless and graphic prints from prompts              |
| **Tech Packs**         | Multi-step tech pack creation with PDF export                  |
| **Asset Library**      | Full digital asset management with folders & tagging           |
| **AI Buying Platform** | Product catalog with sample ordering (role-gated)              |

---

## 2. Tech Stack & Dependencies

### Core Framework

| Technology | Version | Purpose                                               |
| ---------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| Next.js    | 15.3.8  | React framework with App Router, Turbopack dev server |
| React      | 19.0.0  | UI library                                            |
| TypeScript | 5.x     | Type safety                                           |
| pnpm       | -       | Package manager                                       |

### State Management & Data Fetching

| Library              | Version | Purpose                                     |
| -------------------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| Zustand              | 5.0.5   | Client-side state management (17 stores)    |
| TanStack React Query | 5.75.2  | Server state management, caching, mutations |
| Immer                | 10.1.1  | Immutable state updates in Zustand stores   |
| use-immer            | 0.11.0  | Immer integration with React hooks          |

### UI & Styling

| Library                  | Version | Purpose                            |
| ------------------------ | ------- | ---------------------------------- |
| Tailwind CSS             | 4.x     | Utility-first CSS framework        |
| shadcn/ui (Radix UI)     | Various | Accessible UI component primitives |
| Lucide React             | 0.511.0 | Icon library                       |
| class-variance-authority | 0.7.1   | Component variant management       |
| clsx + tailwind-merge    | -       | Conditional class composition      |
| next-themes              | 0.4.6   | Dark/light/system theme support    |
| tailwindcss-animate      | 1.0.7   | Animation utilities                |
| tw-animate-css           | 1.3.0   | CSS animation integration          |

### API & Networking

| Library   | Version | Purpose                         |
| --------- | ------- | ------------------------------- |
| Axios     | 1.9.0   | HTTP client with interceptors   |
| next-auth | 4.24.11 | Authentication (Keycloak OAuth) |

### Canvas & Media

| ------------------- | ------- | ----------------------------------- |
| Fabric.js           | 6.7.1   | Canvas manipulation for tech packs  |
| react-canvas-draw   | 1.2.1   | Drawing canvas for inpainting masks |
| html2canvas-pro     | 1.5.12  | HTML-to-canvas screenshots          |
| react-pdf           | 10.2.0  | PDF viewing                         |
| @react-pdf/renderer | 4.3.1   | PDF generation for tech packs       |

### Utilities

| --------------- | ------- | -------------------------------- |
| Zod             | 4.1.1   | Schema validation                |

| `NEXT_PUBLIC_KEYCLOAK_ISSUER`          | Keycloak realm issuer URL                            |
| `NEXTAUTH_SECRET`                      | NextAuth JWT signing secret                          |

| `NEXT_PUBLIC_PRODUCT_FRUITS_WORKSPACE` | Product Fruits workspace ID                          |

### Environment Setup Script (`set-environment.sh`)

Used during Docker builds to copy the appropriate `.env.*` file to `.env.production`:

```bash
./set-environment.sh dev   # Copies env/.env.dev → .env.production
./set-environment.sh qa    # Copies env/.env.qa → .env.production
./set-environment.sh prod  # Copies env/.env.prod → .env.production
```

### Environment Detection Utility (`lib/utils/environment.ts`)

```typescript
export const APP_ENV = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV ?? "development";
export const isProduction = () => APP_ENV === "production";
export const isDevelopment = () => APP_ENV === "development";
export const isQAEnvironment = () => APP_ENV === "qa";
export const isTrackingEnabled = () => isProduction(); // + cookie consent check
export const shouldLogErrors = () => APP_ENV === "development" || APP_ENV === "qa";
```

## 6. Authentication & Security

### Authentication Flow

The application uses **NextAuth.js v4** with **Keycloak** as the sole OAuth provider.

```
User visits any route
    │
    ▼
middleware.ts checks for NextAuth JWT
    │
    ├── Token found → Allow through
    │
    └── No token → Redirect to /api/auth/signin
                   with callbackUrl preserving UTM params
                        │
                        ▼
                   /auth/signin auto-redirects
                   to Keycloak login page
                        │
                        ▼
                   Keycloak authenticates user
                        │
                        ▼
                   Redirect back with tokens
                   (accessToken, refreshToken, idToken)
                        │
                        ▼
                   Tokens stored in NextAuth JWT session
```

### Middleware (`middleware.ts`)

- **Scope:** Applies to all routes except:
  - `/api/auth/*` (NextAuth API routes)
  - `/_next/*` (Next.js internals)
  - Static files (paths containing `.`)
  - `/auth/signin` (sign-in page)
- **Behavior:** Checks for valid NextAuth JWT. If missing, redirects to sign-in with the original URL as `callbackUrl`
- **Matcher:** `["/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico).*)"]`

### NextAuth Configuration (`app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`)

- **Provider:** Keycloak OAuth
- **Session Strategy:** JWT (not database sessions)
- **Token Storage:** `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, `idToken` stored in JWT
- **Custom Sign-in Page:** `/auth/signin`
- **Sign-out:** Calls Keycloak's logout endpoint to invalidate the session

### Role-Based Access Control

Certain features are gated by JWT roles decoded from the access token:

| Role                | Feature Access                                   |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `ROLE_SAMPLE_ORDER` | AI Buying Platform (`/product`), Sample ordering |

### API Client Auth Interceptor

Both Axios clients (`apiClient` and `productListingApiClient`) attach `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` to every request via interceptors. On `401 Unauthorized`, the user is automatically logged out via NextAuth.

## 1. Project Overview

**styls.ai** is a comprehensive **Generative AI platform for creative fashion workflows**. It provides fashion designers and brands with AI-powered tools for product design, virtual try-on, video generation, pattern creation, image editing, tech pack management, and more.

### Core Features

| Feature                | Description                                                    |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Product Design**     | Text-to-image AI product design with magic prompt assistance   |
| **Virtual Trial**      | Virtual garment try-on with model and background customization |
| **Video Generation**   | AI-powered fashion video creation from photoshoot images       |
| **Sketch to Render**   | Convert hand-drawn sketches to photorealistic 3D renders       |
| **Sketch Generator**   | Generate 2D technical flats from uploaded images               |
| **Precise Editing**    | Canvas-based inpainting for garment detail modifications       |
| **Background Change**  | AI-powered photoshoot background replacement                   |
| **Apply Print**        | Apply prints/patterns onto garment images                      |
| **Seamless Prints**    | Generate seamless and graphic prints from prompts              |
| **Tech Packs**         | Multi-step tech pack creation with PDF export                  |
| **Asset Library**      | Full digital asset management with folders & tagging           |
| **AI Buying Platform** | Product catalog with sample ordering (role-gated)              |

## 6. Authentication & Security

### Authentication Flow

The application uses **NextAuth.js v4** with **Keycloak** as the sole OAuth provider.

```
User visits any route
    │
    ▼
middleware.ts checks for NextAuth JWT
    │
    ├── Token found → Allow through
    │
    └── No token → Redirect to /api/auth/signin
                   with callbackUrl preserving UTM params
                        │
                        ▼
                   /auth/signin auto-redirects
                   to Keycloak login page
                        │
                        ▼
                   Keycloak authenticates user
                        │
                        ▼
                   Redirect back with tokens
                   (accessToken, refreshToken, idToken)
                        │
                        ▼
                   Tokens stored in NextAuth JWT session
```

### Middleware (`middleware.ts`)

- **Scope:** Applies to all routes except:
  - `/api/auth/*` (NextAuth API routes)
  - `/_next/*` (Next.js internals)
  - Static files (paths containing `.`)
  - `/auth/signin` (sign-in page)
- **Behavior:** Checks for valid NextAuth JWT. If missing, redirects to sign-in with the original URL as `callbackUrl`
- **Matcher:** `["/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico).*)"]`

### NextAuth Configuration (`app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`)

- **Provider:** Keycloak OAuth
- **Session Strategy:** JWT (not database sessions)
- **Token Storage:** `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, `idToken` stored in JWT
- **Custom Sign-in Page:** `/auth/signin`
- **Sign-out:** Calls Keycloak's logout endpoint to invalidate the session

### Role-Based Access Control

Certain features are gated by JWT roles decoded from the access token:

| Role                | Feature Access                                   |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `ROLE_SAMPLE_ORDER` | AI Buying Platform (`/product`), Sample ordering |

### API Client Auth Interceptor

Both Axios clients (`apiClient` and `productListingApiClient`) attach `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` to every request via interceptors. On `401 Unauthorized`, the user is automatically logged out via NextAuth.

| **GoogleAnalyticsUserConfig** | Configures GA with user ID                                             |
| **SignupEventTracker**        | Fires signup events across all three platforms                         |
| **ProductFruitsClient**       | Product Fruits in-app onboarding guidance                              |

### Miscellaneous Components

| Component             | Purpose                                                   |
| --------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| **AuthButtons**       | Sign In / Sign Out buttons via NextAuth                   |
| **ContactModal**      | HubSpot contact form via embedded iframe                  |
| **TopupPackages**     | Credit top-up packages with Stripe payment links          |
| **DownloadPDFButton** | Client-side PDF generation and download for tech packs    |
| **DrawingCanvas**     | Image masking canvas with adjustable brush                |
| **ErrorBoundary**     | React class-component error boundary with custom fallback |
| **ModeToggle**        | Light/Dark/System theme toggle dropdown                   |
| **Pagination**        | Page navigation with ellipsis and smart page numbers      |
| **ProductCard**       | Product catalog display card with gradient effects        |
| **SpinnerLoader**     | Animated Loader2 spinning icon                            |

---

## 9. Custom Hooks

### General-Purpose Hooks

| Hook                         | Purpose                                                          | Returns                                                                 |
| ---------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `useIsMobile`                | Detects mobile viewport (<768px) via `matchMedia`                | `boolean`                                                               |
| `useCreditSufficiency`       | Checks if user has enough credits for generation                 | `boolean`                                                               |
| `useCurrentPageTaskId`       | Gets the task ID for the current route from Zustand              | `string \| null`                                                        |
| `useDebounce`                | Generic debounce with configurable delay (default 400ms)         | Debounced value                                                         |
| `useDecodeToken`             | Decodes JWT access token from NextAuth session                   | `{decodedToken, session, status, isLoading, isAuthenticated}`           |
| `useFirstCreditUsageTracker` | Tracks first-ever credit usage across all platforms (idempotent) | `{checkAndTrackFirstCreditUsage, isFirstCreditTracked}`                 |
| `useImageUpload`             | Manages file upload state for 2D sketch, persists to IndexedDB   | `{uploadedFile, base64Image, handleImageSelected}`                      |
| `useLocalStorage`            | Custom localStorage wrapper with same-tab event dispatch         | `setLocalStorageItem`, `getLocalStorageItem`, `useLocalStorageListener` |
| `useRestoreImageUpload`      | Restores uploaded File + base64 from IndexedDB on mount          | Side effect hook                                                        |
| `useRestorePrompt`           | Restores prompt text from IndexedDB on mount                     | Side effect hook; also exports `saveToIndexedDB`                        |
| `useTaskId`                  | Manages task IDs per route — read and write                      | `{taskId, updateTaskId, pageType}`                                      |
| `useTaskIdChanges`           | Triggers callback on task ID changes (specific or all pages)     | Side effect hook                                                        |
| `useURLParamPreservation`    | Preserves URL params across refreshes via localStorage           | `{getTrackingParams, getPreserved, clearPreserved}`                     |

### Analytics Hooks

| Hook                           | Purpose                                                      | Returns                                                                          |
| ------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `useGoogleAnalyticsTracking`   | GA event tracking with userId retry logic                    | `{trackSignup, trackAddToCart, trackSuccessPayment, trackFirstCreditUsage}`      |
| `useGoogleAnalyticsUserConfig` | Configures GA user once after login                          | `{configureUser, hasConfiguredUser, resetConfiguration}`                         |
| `useMetaPixelTracking`         | Meta/Facebook Pixel custom events                            | `{trackCustomEvent, trackAddToCart, trackSuccessPayment, trackFirstCreditUsage}` |
| `usePinterestTracking`         | Pinterest tag tracking with retry                            | `{trackCustomEvent, trackAddToCart, trackSuccessPayment, trackFirstCreditUsage}` |
| `usePaymentSuccessTracking`    | Orchestrates payment events across all 3 platforms           | `{firePaymentSuccessEvents(planDetails)}`                                        |
| `useSignupEventTracker`        | Comprehensive signup tracking: backend check + all platforms | `{isLoading, signupEventStatus, trackingStatus, executeTracking}`                |

### API Hooks (Core)

| Hook                                        | Purpose                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `useApiMutation`                            | Generic TanStack `useMutation` wrapper with error logging, no retry                                                                                         |

### Asset Library Hooks

Major tech pack API hooks: `useCreateTechPack`, `useDeleteTechPack`, `useDuplicateTechPack`, `useUpdateTechPack`, `useUpdateTechPackStatus`, `useTechPacks` (list), `useTechPack` (detail), `useTechPackFilters`, `useBillOfMaterials`, `useColorwaysFinishes`, `useConstructionDetails`, `useCreatePdf`, `useDeductCredits`, `useDressFrontBack`, `useExtractArtworks`, `useFabricAndStitchingInstructions`, `useGarmentMeasurementSpecs`, `useGenerateGarmentCallouts`, `usePantoneDetect`, `useSegmentation`, `useSegmentationV2`, `useSewingPattern`, `useUploadMeasurementExcel`, `useUploadTechPackPdf`.

**Linesheet hooks:** `useExtractColors`, `useExtractLinesheetInfo`, `useExtractSegments`.

content.text:
This project is **styls.ai** (code name: `mes-genai-ui`) — a **Generative AI platform for creative fashion workflows**.

## Overview

It's a Next.js 15 + React 19 + TypeScript web application that provides fashion designers and brands with AI-powered tools for:

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Product Design** | Text-to-image AI product design with magic prompt assistance |
| **Virtual Try-On** | Virtual garment try-on with model/background customization |
| **Video Generation** | AI fashion video creation from photoshoot images |
| **Sketch to Render** | Convert hand-drawn sketches to photorealistic 3D renders |
| **Sketch Generator** | Generate 2D technical flats from uploaded images |
| **Precise Editing** | Canvas-based inpainting for garment detail modifications |
| **Background Change** | AI-powered photoshoot background replacement |
| **Print Application** | Apply prints/patterns onto garment images |
| **Seamless Prints** | Generate seamless and graphic prints from prompts |
| **Tech Packs** | Multi-step tech pack creation with PDF export |
| **Asset Library** | Digital asset management with folders & tagging |
| **AI Buying Platform** | Product catalog with sample ordering (role-gated) |

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 15.3.8 (App Router, Turbopack)
- **Frontend:** React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4
- **UI:** shadcn/ui (Radix primitives), Lucide icons
- **State:** Zustand (17 stores), TanStack Query, Immer
- **Auth:** NextAuth.js with Keycloak OAuth
- **Canvas:** Fabric.js, react-canvas-draw
- **PDF:** @react-pdf/renderer for tech pack generation
- **Testing:** Vitest + React Testing Library
- **Infra:** Docker, Helm charts for Kubernetes

## Key Architecture

- 31 route pages in `app/` covering all AI features
- 40+ component directories with feature-based organization
- 17 Zustand stores for client state
- WebSocket-based task polling for long-running AI generations
- IndexedDB persistence for drafts/uploads
- Role-based access control (RBAC) for premium features
- Credit/subscription system integrated with Stripe
